{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Alliance (Cradle)
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The Alliance will not be divided before the arrival of outsiders.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9">''Soulsmith'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
